title: MIDE-109 Document of goodbye just before retirement Miku Ohashi with real face - Ohashi Miku
overview: Following the previous work "Woman named Miku Ohashi", a documentary AV that records vivid SEX while exploring the path that Satoshi Imada has taken. At the time of his debut, he visited the coffee shop where he had a meeting with the scout man and the site of the first shooting, and was fascinated by the bewitching entanglement that evolved with the memory that revived. This is a documentary film of the real face of AV actress Miku Ohashi.
